events.title: Locust Swarm
events.description: A dark cloud of locusts rolls across the fields, devouring crops faster than farmers can swing their tools.

choices.text: Burn the worst fields to stop the spread

events.title: Tax Revolt
events.description: Citizens gather in the square shouting about taxes and fairness. The treasury guards look nervous.

events.title: Warehouse Fire
events.description: A storehouse near the docks has caught fire, and smoke billows over the market district.

events.title: Bandit Raids
events.description: Travelers report bandits ambushing caravans on the roads leading into the city.

choices.text: Hire extra guards for the roads

events.title: Crop Disease
events.description: A strange blight spreads through the farmland, turning healthy crops gray and brittle.

events.title: Worker Strike
events.description: Dock workers and builders refuse to work until their wages are improved.

events.title: Grain Spoilage
events.description: Moisture has ruined several granaries of stored grain. The smell alone is concerning.

choices.text: Sell it cheaply before it worsens

events.title: Thieves Guild Rumors
events.description: Whispers in the taverns suggest an organized group of thieves has begun operating in the city.

events.title: Harsh Winter
events.description: Snow arrives early and stays longer than expected. Supplies will not last forever.

events.title: Market Collapse
events.description: A series of failed trade deals sends the local market into chaos.

events.title: Traveling Merchant
events.description: A merchant caravan arrives with unusual goods and interesting offers.

events.title: Village Festival
events.description: Citizens propose holding a festival with music, games, and far too much food.

choices.text: Let the citizens organize it themselves

events.title: Grain Trade Offer
events.description: Nearby farmers offer a trade deal that could shift your food reserves.

events.title: Tax Policy Debate
events.description: Advisors argue over whether taxes should rise or fall this season.

events.title: Public Feast
events.description: Citizens suggest a grand feast to celebrate the town's recent stability.

events.title: Goose Uprising
events.description: Several unusually aggressive geese have taken control of the town fountain.

events.title: Drunk Bard
events.description: A bard loudly sings questionable songs about your leadership in the tavern.

events.title: Great Harvest
events.description: The farms report an exceptionally productive harvest this season.

events.title: Visiting Scholars
events.description: Scholars from a neighboring town arrive to share knowledge and observations about the region.
